title: CAM Partner Faraz Alam Sagar joins CMS INDUSLAW as Equity Partner
description: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas Partner Faraz Alam Sagar has left the firm and is joining CMS INDUSLAW as an Equity Partner, and Head of Dispute Resolution & White-Collar Crimes, in its Mumbai Office.Sagar is a 2006 graduate of Symbiosis Law School, Pune. He earned his Master of Business Laws from National Law School of India University and his LLM in Finance Laws from Goethe University Frankfurt. He is a Permanent Member of the Bombay Bar Association.Sagar has spent over two decades navigating co
